code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut depth = 0
mut bad = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 40
    depth = depth + 1
  else if b == 41
    if depth == 0
      bad = true
    else
      depth = depth - 1
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if bad or depth != 0
  print("NO")
else
  print("YES")
end
